description.en: Convert up to 10 documents per month. No watermarks.
description.zh: 每月最多转换10份文档。无水印。

weaknesses.en: Limited file size and number of documents per month.
weaknesses.zh: 文件大小和每月文档数量有限。
没有高级功能可供选择。

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small businesses who need basic PDF conversion and management tools.
targetAudience.zh: 需要基本PDF转换和管理工具的个人和小型企业。

positioning.en: TinyPDF positions itself as a simple and free tool for basic PDF needs.
positioning.zh: TinyPDF将其定位为一个简单且免费的基本PDF需求工具。
